name: World's Next Big Thing
overview:
World’s Next Big Thing produced by Award Winning Executive Producer Errol Silverman combines the award-winning TV show Shark Tank and multibillion dollar crowdfunding platform Kickstarter.

In each episode, five (5) Black and Latino entrepreneurs pitch their innovative startups in the hopes of finding investors.   The show is fully interactive, allowing viewers to invest their own money right from their phones!  The minimum investment is only $10, allowing the general public equal access to the hottest IPO investments!
